alternative_parents.description: Aliphatic Hydrocarbons that contains one or more unsaturated carbon atoms. These compounds contain one or more double or triple bonds.
alternative_parents.name: Unsaturated aliphatic hydrocarbons

class.description: Acyclic hydrocarbons (and by extension, derivatives formed by substitution) having two double bonds from one carbon atom to two others.
class.name: Acyclic allenes

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as acyclic allenes. These are acyclic hydrocarbons (and by extension, derivatives formed by substitution) having two double bonds from one carbon atom to two others.

direct_parent.description: Acyclic hydrocarbons (and by extension, derivatives formed by substitution) having two double bonds from one carbon atom to two others.
direct_parent.name: Acyclic allenes

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

superclass.description: Compounds in which one carbon atom has double bonds with each of its two adjacent carbon centers. The definition includes both the hydrocarbon molecules and their derivatives obtained by substitution.
superclass.name: Allenes
